info.title: InterlinedList API
info.description:
HTTP API for InterlinedList. Generated deterministically from the route tree under app/api/ and enriched from docs/api-reference.md by scripts/generate-openapi.js (`npm run docs:openapi`). Served at /api/openapi.json and rendered at /api-docs.

Most endpoints accept either a session cookie (`interlinedlist-session`) or a Bearer sync token from POST /api/auth/sync-token. A subset (auth account management, exports, identities, organizations, LinkedIn, message dig, architecture aggregates) requires the session cookie.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Login, registration, sync tokens, password reset, account switching, OAuth provider flows.

tags.name: Messages
tags.description: Posting, replies, dig reactions, scheduled posts, media uploads, cross-posting.

tags.name: Lists
tags.description: List CRUD, schema/DSL, data rows, watchers, connections, search.

tags.name: Documents
tags.description: Document CRUD, delta sync, templates, search, image uploads.

tags.name: Users & Profile
tags.description: Current user, profile updates, avatars, linked identities, public profiles.

tags.name: Following
tags.description: Follow/unfollow, follow requests, follower & following lists.

tags.name: Organizations
tags.description: Org CRUD, members, LinkedIn page integration. Session cookie required.

tags.name: Notifications
tags.description: Notification tray, mark read, single & bulk operations.

tags.name: Push Notifications
tags.description: Register and unregister APNS device tokens.

tags.name: Exports
tags.description: CSV exports of messages, lists, list rows, and follows. Session cookie required.

tags.name: GitHub
tags.description: Connected-account GitHub issue and repo helpers.

tags.name: LinkedIn
tags.description: Personal LinkedIn posting targets and OAuth. Session cookie required.

tags.name: Utility
tags.description: Geolocation, weather, image proxy, analytics, OAuth metadata, status probes.

tags.name: Billing
tags.description: Stripe checkout and customer portal sessions.

tags.name: Webhooks & Cron
tags.description: Internal endpoints: signature-verified webhooks and CRON_SECRET jobs. Not for general client use.
